##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Sprays of pale-pink bunched prismatic crystals associated with white willemite, brown sphalerite,  and dark-brown to black franklinite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
